message:
refactor(types): Export named delta schemas and enhance validation types

This commit refactors the Zod schema definitions in types.ts to improve
modularity, type safety, and extensibility of the delta and validation systems.

## Delta Schema Refactoring

Previously, the PlaybookDeltaSchema used inline anonymous object definitions
within the discriminated union. This made it impossible to reference individual
delta types elsewhere in the codebase. Now each delta type is exported as a
named schema:

- AddDeltaSchema: For adding new playbook bullets
- HelpfulDeltaSchema: For recording positive feedback
- HarmfulDeltaSchema: For recording negative feedback with reason enum
- ReplaceDeltaSchema: For updating bullet content (reason now optional)
- DeprecateDeltaSchema: For marking bullets as deprecated
- MergeDeltaSchema: For combining multiple bullets (reason now optional)

The PlaybookDeltaSchema now references these named exports, enabling:
- Type inference from individual schemas via z.infer<typeof AddDeltaSchema>
- Schema reuse in validation contexts
- Better IDE autocomplete and documentation

## NewBulletDataSchema Simplification

Changed from a verbose explicit schema to using PlaybookBulletSchema.partial()
with required content/category fields. This ensures NewBulletData always stays
in sync with PlaybookBullet without manual maintenance.

## ValidationResult Enhancements

- Added ACCEPT_WITH_CAUTION to verdict enum for cases where validation passes
  but with caveats (previously this was handled inconsistently as REFINE)
- Changed evidence arrays from optional to default empty arrays, eliminating
  null checks throughout the validation pipeline
- supportingEvidence and contradictingEvidence now use .default([]) for
  consistent initialization

## Other Changes

- Added HarmfulReasonSchema as an alias for HarmfulReasonEnum for consistency
- Added optional formattedPrompt field to ContextResultSchema for LLM context
- Made InversionReportSchema.reason optional to handle edge cases
- Removed unused auditLevel from SanitizationConfigSchema
- Added trailing newline for POSIX compliance
